title: Takhaff Uul
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=Takhaff Uul |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], ''[[Fu'ulanh]]'' |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |caste=[[Priest caste]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Takhaff Uul, do you trust in our gods?''"
"''I do, Warmaster.''"
"''Do they trust ''you''?|Tsavong Lah and Takhaff Uul|''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''}} '''Takhaff Uul''' was a member of the [[priest caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Uul was a [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] of [[Yun-Yuuzhan]], the Creator. After the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], Uul approached [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]. He said he had a dream in which Yun-Yuuzhan was angry for not receiving any of the glory from the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]]. Uul said the Creator wanted a whole world to be made into a temple for Yun-Yuuzhan. In truth, Takhaff Uul was conspiring with [[Master Shaper]] [[Ghithra Dal]] to control Lah. On the [[Shaper caste|shaper]] vessel ''[[Fu'ulanh]]'', Lah unleashed a group of [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]], killing Uul, Dal, and their co-conspirators. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Takhaff Uul }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Uul, Takhaff}} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong priest caste]]
